<!--
Thanks for contributing to Logres! Please fill out the sections below.
Keep the PR focused — one logical change per PR is easier to review.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? Link the problem it solves. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] 🧪 Tests
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] 🔧 Build / CI / tooling
- [ ] ⚠️ Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 / Relates to #456 -->

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands run, scenarios covered, manual steps. Paste relevant output. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `make ci` passes locally (fmt, vet, lint, govulncheck, gosec, `-race`, coverage, build)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests (table-driven, black-box at the layer under test)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or PII in code, logs, or fixtures
- [ ] Docs / comments updated where behavior or public API changed
- [ ] Security-relevant changes reviewed against `.claude/rules/security-compliance.md`
- [ ] I understand and agree that my contribution is licensed under **AGPL-3.0**

## Screenshots / notes

<!-- For UI changes (web / webAdmin), include before/after screenshots. Optional otherwise. -->
